positive: A whimsical and mystical forest scene at twilight. The central focus is on bioluminescent flora, glowing mushrooms, and intertwined root systems that cast a soft, ethereal glow. The color palette must be dominated by deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and subtle violet accents. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical, high contrast, and centered, designed to be a striking, print-friendly repeating pattern element. Style: hyper-detailed digital illustration, magical realism, volumetric lighting, rim lighting emphasizing glowing edges, maximalist yet elegant. The overall feel should evoke deep fantasy and wonder. Clean silhouettes, highly defined edges, fantasy concept art.
